name: GlobalTech Corp
business: GlobalTech Corp is a technology holding company that provides telecom services (international voice termination, broadband, cable TV) in Pakistan through its subsidiary, and develops AI and big data software products globally.

exposures.sentence: We are a leading cable and broadband operator in Pakistan and a prominent broadband communication services company providing video and broadband internet services in major cities of Pakistan through Hybrid Fiber Coaxial (HFC) and state-of-the-art fiber optic networks.
CADNZ is a unique AI Enabled Digital Lending Platform that seeks to deliver frictionless operational excellence.
Under our technology development initiative, we have also developed and matured software products and services, targeting emergent opportunities in AI & Big data.

tamClaims.claim: Market of almost 3 million households for subscriber acquisition
tamClaims.sentence: The Company has nearly 1,900 kilometers (1,180 miles) of fiber optic infrastructure deployed across 20 major cities of Pakistan with a potential ability to access a market of almost 3 million households for subscriber acquisition.
